speaker: MATT
raw_text: Nearly at the ready. All right, so as you all take a moment and kind of steel yourselves, your ears perk up and you can hear what sounds like echoes of distant footsteps down hallways, far out of sight. You hear some movement across the stone ceiling above you that eventually comes to a stop. And you wait for about a minute, and the entire place is now in a very eerie silence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're following her, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've followed her back into the base floor of the Emberhold itself. You all currently are now back kinda where you started after you snuck into the side passage of the Emberhold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And she said she would lead the way to the vault?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can we be quiet for a second and see if there's any footsteps around us or guards marching around? Are we in immediate peril or do we have a second?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Certainly. Everyone go ahead and make an immediate perception roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So fast!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Website went live, if you want to announce that now or later.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Later. Two?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, 22! (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Fail.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a fail! All right, so-- You've got to be ready!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure he'll give you half of that.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You haven't had a short rest yet, and you do--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And his back is to me, currently?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's kinda to the side to you. He's currently looking-- working out the anvil, banging down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So this way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, but I see the door on the other side, so I take the earring--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, why don't you just keep going forever?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: -- take the earring and I whisper to my sister, (whispers) follow along.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. I've been invited on the field trip, guys!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just me!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Who else can stealth?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm a stealthy panther right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you wanna be something and pop in my pocket? (laughs) That sounded wrong.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You haven't taken a short rest yet. You have to-- you guys have to stop and take ten minutes, 15 minutes to rest to do that, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Exit the other side of the great hall that we're in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I think we should all go back-- we should go to the second floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Through here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Walking in that door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You look through here and see what appears to be some sort of a kitchen. You can see shelf units, you can see what looks like a few tables, you can see some kitchen elements.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna walk all the way in, all the way in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you walk all the way in. There's a door towards the back--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The right, what do I see?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The right, you see what looks to be a doorway that's partially open that leads to a staircase.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Up or down?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Looks like it's going up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And what's in this room? I'm looking over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you look over here. It's a double door that is currently closed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will head in your direction as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Eight, two of my d6s to heal up.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: His hands drop and it looks like for a minute his intent to begin muttering some sort of incantation is momentarily distracted.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So vicious.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That is threatening.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Damn.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh. That does seven points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seven points from Vicious Mockery? All right! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I don't know how that works.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's Vicious Mockery. It's an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's crazy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's, like, 80 points of damage!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And who said that words couldn't hurt people?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And bonus damage to his mother, wherever she may be.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sticks and stones can break my bones, but words can hurt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So it has to make a will saving throw, against your DC. It rolls a three. It does not. So, as you shout out into this room, the currently fearful duergar mage kind of glances, eyes slide about, hears these words and you see him wrack his head for a second with a sudden sense of self-loathing and disappointment. (laughter)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That's up to you guys, as I say, do you guys want to take a short rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, cool!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go in and look around some more.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're looking around as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Look around for potions and stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's considered the-- aw, I could have been rolling twice for all these damn things!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (sings) Remember your abilities.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (sings) 25.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Who's the singer here, people?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, Scanlan. So, as Kima pulls the blade from its body, kicking it off the greatsword and wiping it across the leather on the side-- the leather that you gave to her! And a little part of you is like, (sadly) hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's all right. Worth it. This halfling's hot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you guys made your way back, Clarota's there, against the corner, and Grog rushes over, just feeling like he was ready for action. "What's going on?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You're too late.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This might be a good time to stop for a moment.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, as you guys all kind of enter this room, this brief safe zone to take a short rest, if you feel you want to heal yourself up and regain any short rest-based abilities, do so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It looks delicious. No, actually, you can't make out, it has some changing color as you kind of swirl the bottle and watch the texture inside shift and change with the centrifugal force. You can't make out anything about its intent, but it does feel like it's a potion created with some effect.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tiberius, do you want to drink this?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: No! What is it? I check it for 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: For what?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: For whatever you're trying to hand to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18 arcana? Okay. You take a look at it. It definitely is magical, you don't have a lot of experience with alchemy but you gather that the effect that it would have upon imbibement would be to alter your physical form in some way, you just don't know the specific effects.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Absolutely, Scanlan, I'll take that for now. And I put it in my pouch.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's take a short rest.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, all right. That ends your turn. It is now Lady Kima's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, that's just to hit something with a spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so basilisk in front makes it, so it takes the eight damage. Okay, the rest of the duergar, they do make their saves, they take half damage. However, with the spray of arrows that comes flying out of the front of your bow, you manage to take out five duergar in one swipe. The others ones remain, damaged but still standing. Also, now dexterity saving throw for you, Tiberius, and Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice. So both you guys take eight damage. Grog fails, Grog takes 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's all right." All right, Vex, is that the end of your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I move Trinket in, and I want to-- If I can get him to illithid, I want to get Trinket close, like kind of behind the queen. No, no, I want to get him near. That way he can flank.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Next up is King Murghol, who's furious now. Both of his beasts have been slain and most of his men have been completely torn asunder by multitudes of arrows and fireball spells. He, now growing in physical form, on top of already the musculature he acquired from that potion, is going to make his three attacks against whatever is nearby. That's actually going to be-- actually, that's gonna be two strikes against you, Scanlan, since you just now tried to make him stand on his head, and one against Kima. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Suggestion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (laughs) What's your DC?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. This is through the hand cone?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Through the hand cone, through the hand cone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That will be a 20, unfortunately. Makes his saving throw. He glances back towards you with a look of confusion for a second. Looks at his feet and like begins to reach forward and then steels his mind and looks up at you angrily. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I also, as my bonus action-- Who's around me? Who needs inspiration? Who needs inspiring? Who's-- yeah, oh, shit. I'll give Pike some inspiration, 'cause she's my awesome sweetheart.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What do I get?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You get 1d8.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Hey, thanks, man.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Once a round you can do it? Okay, well never mind. So take half on that first attack. All right, so. First strike comes at you with a-- oof, that'll be 19 points of damage. Reduced to nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (Grog voice) Wrong direction!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is a 25 versus armor class.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but Uncanny Dodge!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How many times can you-- you've already used that. It's once per encounter. Once per encounter you can use that. Next one is a 21 versus armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Once a round.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yep. All right, so both arrows (impact sounds). One clips her in the leg, and the other embeds itself in her abdomen. You see she grabs for it. She's looking really rough. Next is Kima. Kima's stone. It's now the queen's turn. She looks over at you who's stabbed her, the arrows in her abdomen, and she looks up at Grog and says, (sighs) "We've got business elsewhere." And she reaches out and touches Grog. Both of them blink out, Dimension Door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You-- it's completely blocked right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I run across behind it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Through here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Is that magmous right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it is. It's still pouring! She slowed it down, but it's still breaking through and pouring out slower. It would be even bigger if they hadn't slowed it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then well, maybe I won't run in that direction. I run in the other direction and down-- yeah. So I can see.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Roll for an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: First attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: First attack is (sings) 20. No. 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! Okay. 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Second attack is-- Second attack is (sings) 21!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hits. Roll damage on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What's that? 12?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Or 12 damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 12 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, 12 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, um. Hunter's Mark. Damn it. Bonus action!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It was permanent, but a perpetual flow of magma on it for a period of a few hours will eventually eat through a stone wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ah, it's hot, it's hot, it's hot!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hot hot hot hot hot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'm picking up Tiberius' stone butt and continuing--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you guys push through the open hole that Keyleth pushed in, sweat dripping down your faces as the heat proximity to you is nigh-intolerable. You make your way out of the gate and now you have that giant magma flow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right! Is the thing not-- wasn't there--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No no-- as you guys go and step out, the doorway that opened up, previously? Is what parted the magma flow. You pulled it open, so now it's just a wall of magma in front of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She also had created a wall barrier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I did create a wall over top.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You did. It's not there anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It was permanent!
